scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names SHARED,API,WEB "npm run dev:shared" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace=@hvacflow/api && npm run build --workspace=@hvacflow/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=@hvacflow/api && npm run lint --workspace=@hvacflow/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=@hvacflow/shared-types && npm run typecheck --workspace=@hvacflow/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=@hvacflow/web
scripts.dev:apps: concurrently --kill-others --names API,WEB "npm --workspace @hvacflow/api run dev" "npm --workspace @hvacflow/web run dev"
